name: healthcare_port_security_scanner_marrowbridge_jus_mer
premise: A transplant center received an organ offer that conflicts with an internal research biopsy schedule and OR block time. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare port security scanner marrowbridge jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Soren Santos
agents.identity: I am Soren Santos, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Rahman
agents.identity: I am Gideon Rahman, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with mercy.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to mercy to preserve operational justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Soren Santos must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Soren Santos do?
